patterns.why_it_matters: Piko can study this as a pattern for workflow orchestration without copying source code.
patterns.piko_mapping_hint: Useful pattern for explicit, inspectable workflow state.
patterns.risk: Needs adapter boundary; do not let external runtime bypass Piko verification.
